caption: Figure 3: Ablation study comparing three framework stages (rows) across three test scenarios (columns). The mathematical baseline exhibits a high false-positive rate (FPR), which is visibly reduced when the LLM council is introduced. The full AIVV framework integrates the adaptation pipeline to achieve optimal validation.
description2: A pipeline diagram comparing three framework stages across three test scenarios, featuring a mathematical baseline and two additional stages: LLM council and full AIVV framework.
description3: The multi-panel plot displays three rows of line charts, each showing three columns representing different test scenarios and framework stages.
questions: What is the overall goal of the framework, according to the caption?
How does the caption describe the relationship between baseline and full framework?

caption: Figure 4: Effect of gain-tuning on REMUS 100 hovering (Dataset 1) yaw response
description2: The figure plots the effect of gain-tuning on the yaw response of REMUS 100 hovering in Dataset 1.
description3: Two-panel line chart plots yaw angle (in degrees) versus time step, comparing responses before and after gain-tuning of a REMUS 100 hovering.
questions: How does gain-tuning affect the yaw response of the REMUS 100 while hovering?
